executive_summary.main_recommendation: AI spend appears productive overall, not wasteful: budget usage is 81.7%, spend is forecast to decline 5.6% next month, and the dashboard shows a 17.5% gain in delivery with a 59.6% reduction in bugs. The best next move is to control a small set of very high-token users whose tokens per story point are worse than the team median, while formally using the strongest high-roi and efficient users as coaches. This balances cost control with wider adoption, so savings come from reducing clearly inefficient usage rather than cutting effective AI work.

employee_metrics.name: Leila Park
employee_metrics.recommendation: Leila Park sets the standard: rank #1 of 40 in story points and rank #2 in efficiency, with 206858 tokens per story point versus a team median of 4285456; tokens per story point means how many tokens were spent to deliver one story point, and lower is better. She also resolved 22 tickets versus the median of 9 and finished work in 1.5 days versus 2.29 days. Praise this behavior and replicate her workflow by having her mentor peers on prompt discipline and keeping context tight. Next month, watch tokens per story point.
